summary: Frontend-only verification of Paneltec mobile v160.0.19 (sticky back + 2-col grid) and v160.0.20 (WATCH tile removed). All bugs verified fixed via live Playwright test at 390x844 mobile viewport as ADMIN. All regressions pass.

test_results.BUG-v160.0.19-A_sticky_back_button: PASS - [data-testid='library-back-btn'] renders at y=12 before scroll and REMAINS at y=12 after scrolling ScrollView to bottom. Confirmed sibling-of-ScrollView pattern (not inside). Contains chevron + 'Back' text.
test_results.BUG-v160.0.19-B_2_column_grid: PASS - Exactly 2 columns × 3 rows on 390px viewport. Unique X positions: [16, 202]. Unique Y positions: [57, 216, 375]. Card width 172px (~44% of 390). All 6 testids present: cat-card-general, cat-card-pre_start, cat-card-inspection, cat-card-near_miss, cat-card-incident, cat-card-toolbox. Screenshot confirms 2x3 layout.
test_results.BUG-v160.0.20_WATCH_tile_removed: PASS - Logged in as ADMIN (role=admin confirmed via /api/auth/login response). [data-testid='attention-score-card'] does NOT exist in DOM. No compliance-score circular tile rendered. Below-tile layout has no awkward gap; briefing/metrics/manage sections flow naturally. Note: safe-fallback banner also appears on this preview (expected per request note), but DOM inspection confirms genuine tile removal (not just fallback hiding).
test_results.Regression_bottom_tabs: PASS - Tab bar has exactly: HOME, QR SCAN, OUTBOX, MY WORK, PROFILE (5 tabs, no Forms/Capture).
test_results.Version_marker: PASS - Home overline reads 'PANELTEC CIVIL · paneltec-v160.0.20'.

critical_code_review_comments: dashboard.tsx still has duplicate StyleSheet keys carried over from prior iteration (metricLabel/metricSub declared twice, captureTitle/captureDesc twice at lines 290-306). Latter wins at runtime but should be deduped.
dashboard.tsx CAPTURE_TOOLS array + visibleCapture memo remain defined but unused after v160.0.18 removal — dead code.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Web preview shows safe-fallback banner on dashboard (expected). For WATCH-tile removal check, always verify DOM absence of [data-testid='attention-score-card'] rather than relying on visual state. /forms/library ScrollView uses [data-testid='forms-categories-page']; scroll via element.scrollTop, not page.mouse.wheel(), for sticky-header verification.
